---
title: "test"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This is a test setup for using version control using Git and GitHub. 

test plot

```{r, test-plot}
plot(cars, col = "red", xlab = "speed (mph)", ylab = "distance (miles)")

```

A summary of data is here below
```{r, cars-summary}
library(knitr)
kable(summary(cars))

```more refined would be to use the Diff functionmore refined would be to use the Diff function
